title: Dujone
subTitle: Akash is the son of a rich industrialist who falls in love with a poor girl and intends to marry her. Soon, their families find out and start opposing their relationship.

title: Titli
subTitle: When a young man attempts to escape the life of carjacking that his brothers have planned for him, he finds an unlikely ally in Neelu, the woman they've arranged for him to marry.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: After learning that Mainadevi grants permission for the wedding, Tarakasura becomes enraged. However, He devises a plan to thwart the marriage.

title: Bangshadhar
subTitle: After Pwena kills his brother, Khokon Chowdhuri's wife manages the family business. A property dispute ensues, exploring themes of betrayal and inheritance.

title: Dadu No.1
subTitle: Bhawani Chatterjee, a rich businessman, tries to play the matchmaker between his employee, Mamta, who is a widow and grandson.

title: Raju Uncle
subTitle: Raju, a poor young teacher, takes care of orphans at his mortgaged house. He finds a well-paying secret detective job which does not merit him to help pay off his loan amount.

title: Bandhan
subTitle: After his wife's demise, a man tries to start over with her estranged family. When he falls in love with his wife's twin, he fears that his efforts to mend broken relations will go to waste.

title: Bhalobasa Bhalobasa
subTitle: Sidhu meets and falls in love with a woman named Priya despite being engaged to a different girl. He soon has to make a choice between following his heart and respecting his father's wishes.

title: Tulkalam
subTitle: Honest, hard-working villagers fight against the forces of industrialisation threatening to take their land away.

title: Ghore Pherar Gaan
subTitle: Ghore Pherar Gaan

title: Ghore Pherar Gaan
subTitle: Ghore Pherar Gaan

title: Superstar - A Love Story
subTitle: Alisha, a victim of abuse, finds comfort and safety in Raja, a choreographer. However, certain events lead to misunderstandings, which result in a falling out between them.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Vishnu confronts Bali and punishes him after learning about his sinister motive. Tarakasura plans revenge on Vishnu.

title: Bhokatta
subTitle: Bhokatta

title: Sathi Amar
subTitle: After his parents' death, Raja takes care of his sister and falls in love with one of her friends, Jyoti. He attempts his best to win over his lover.

title: Dui Prithibi
subTitle: A rich man falls in love with an idealistic medical student. However, when circumstances force them apart, he learns the true meaning and value of love.

title: Chhoto Bou
subTitle: A mother-in-law treats her daughters-in-law, Mamta, Tandra and Deepa, according to their husband's income. However, when she falls ill, she realises her folly.

title: Ranakshetra
subTitle: When Santu protests against availability of drugs and gets murdered by a minister's son, his brother, Raja decides to seek justice on his own after his legal efforts go in vain.

title: Yuddha
subTitle: Agnishwar Rai, a noble officer, is stone-hearted towards criminals and gets arrested when he puts an MLA behind bars. Filled with anger, he avenges his wife's death, after she was murdered by the same bureaucrat.

title: Le Halua Le
subTitle: Sonali moves to the city to earn money and repay her debts to her landlord. She fakes a marriage with Suvojeet, a struggling artist, in order to get low-priced accommodation.

title: Le Halua Le
subTitle: Sonali moves to the city to earn money and repay her debts to her landlord. She fakes a marriage with Suvojeet, a struggling artist, in order to get low-priced accommodation.

title: Autograph
subTitle: Samar, a deep-sea diver, revisits the memories of his past relationships. He cherishes the moments of joy and appreciates the contribution of all the people who are a part of his life.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: While Parvati attempts to convince Lord Shiva to protect the planet, Tarakasura seeks help from Brahma.

title: Ami Neta Hobo
subTitle: After several attempts, a young man gathers enough courage to fight for his rights and rises against a corrupt politician.

title: Aparajita
subTitle: Sagar and Mamta's marital bliss is dampened due to a misunderstanding. While pregnant with their child, she leaves the house and vows to raise a talented singer.

title: Kencho Khunrte Keute
subTitle: Gyanoda loses his son and daughter-in-law, leaving his granddaughter Parama as a spoilt child. To discipline her, he leaves a will which requires her to marry to gain full inheritance access.

title: I Love You
subTitle: A rich boy loves a poor village girl, but when his family insults her, he chooses to leave his wealthy life and move to her simple village to prove his love.

title: Aakrosh
subTitle: Two detectives investigate the disappearance of three medical students in a small village, but their search is hampered by corrupt local authorities.

title: Dada Thakur
subTitle: Gita plans to reunite with her long-estranged father, not knowing that he is waiting for her younger sister, Mita, to return. The two siblings then struggle to win back his trust.

title: Neel Akasher Chandni
subTitle: Neel Akasher Chandni
